title: Amtech F1758 15 Piece Tungsten masonry drill bit set
features: DURABLE: These masonry drill bits are made from heavy duty, cold forged steel with strong tungsten carbide tips for concrete
SIZES: Supplied in plastic storage case, the set includes sizes 3 x 5mm, 3 x 5.5mm, 2 x 6mm, 3 x 7mm, 2 x 8mm and 2 x 10mm
SIZE CAPACITY: 5 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don't forget to also take advantage of amtech’s free product advice service – See pack for more details. Please note that amtech Warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine amtech products. Safety Warning No
